name: endurance
description:
Alfred Lansing's Endurance: Shackleton's Incredible Voyage — an executable toolkit for leadership under extreme adversity, drawn from the true story of Ernest Shackleton's 1914 Antarctic expedition and the survival of all 28 crew members against impossible odds. Covers crisis leadership, team cohesion under pressure, decision-making with no good options, maintaining hope in desperate circumstances, and adaptability when plans fail.

Related skills: grit, leadership-in-turbulent-times, cant-hurt-me, the-outsiders, the-war-of-art.
useCase: Helps leaders navigate extreme adversity by applying Ernest Shackleton's proven methods for keeping teams alive, united, and hopeful when everything goes wrong.
knownRisks: Shackleton's methods were extreme for extreme circumstances; adapt the principles to your context.
